2D Gaussian Mixture Clustering Simulation Dashboard

Evaluation of Wasserstein-based discrepancy measures and refinement strategies

Author

Alexander

Published

March 1, 2026

Scenarios

Code 
scen1 <- local({
  set.seed(1)
  N <- 100; K <- 3
  mu_true <- matrix(c(-2, 0, 0, 0, 2, 0), nrow = 3, byrow = TRUE)
  Sigma_true <- lapply(1:3, function(i) diag(c(0.2, 0.2)))
  w_true <- c(0.3, 0.4, 0.3)
  cl_true <- sample(1:K, N, replace = TRUE, prob = w_true)
  y <- matrix(NA, N, 2)
  for (k in 1:K) {
    idx <- cl_true == k
    y[idx, ] <- MASS::mvrnorm(sum(idx), mu_true[k, ], Sigma_true[[k]])
  }
  tibble(y1 = y[,1], y2 = y[,2], cluster = factor(cl_true))
})

scen1 |>
  ggplot(aes(x = y1, y = y2, colour = cluster)) +
  geom_point(size = 2.2, alpha = 0.85) +
  scale_colour_viridis_d(option = "plasma", end = 0.9) +
  labs(
    title = "Scenario 1",
    subtitle = "K = 3, N = 100, moderate overlap, equal variances",
    x = "Dimension 1", y = "Dimension 2"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 13) +
  theme(legend.position = "bottom", panel.grid.minor = element_blank())
Code 
scen2 <- local({
  set.seed(2)
  N <- 150; K <- 4
  mu_true <- matrix(c(-4, 0, -1, 0, 1, 0, 4, 0), nrow = 4, byrow = TRUE)
  Sigma_true <- lapply(1:4, function(i) diag(c(0.5, 0.5)))
  w_true <- rep(0.25, 4)
  cl_true <- sample(1:K, N, replace = TRUE, prob = w_true)
  y <- matrix(NA, N, 2)
  for (k in 1:K) {
    idx <- cl_true == k
    y[idx, ] <- MASS::mvrnorm(sum(idx), mu_true[k, ], Sigma_true[[k]])
  }
  tibble(y1 = y[,1], y2 = y[,2], cluster = factor(cl_true))
})

scen2 |>
  ggplot(aes(x = y1, y = y2, colour = cluster)) +
  geom_point(size = 2.2, alpha = 0.85) +
  scale_colour_viridis_d(option = "viridis", end = 0.9) +
  labs(
    title = "Scenario 2",
    subtitle = "K = 4, N = 150, well separated, equal variances",
    x = "Dimension 1", y = "Dimension 2"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 13) +
  theme(legend.position = "bottom", panel.grid.minor = element_blank())
Code 
results_dir <- params$results_dir
files <- list.files(results_dir, pattern = "\\.rds$", full.names = TRUE)

all_results <- map_dfr(files, readRDS) |>
  mutate(
    scenario_label = case_when(
      scenario == "scen1" ~ "Scenario 1 (moderate overlap)",
      scenario == "scen2" ~ "Scenario 2 (well separated)",
      TRUE ~ scenario
    ),
    clusterwise_label = if_else(clusterwise, "Yes (per-component)", "No (global mixture)")
  )

filtered <- all_results |>
  filter(
    scenario %in% params$scenario_filter,
    method %in% params$method_filter,
    clusterwise %in% params$clusterwise_filter,
    n_sweet >= params$nsweet_min,
    n_sweet <= params$nsweet_max,
    n_ms >= params$nms_min,
    n_ms <= params$nms_max,
    nu_0 >= params$nu0_min,
    nu_0 <= params$nu0_max
  )
Code 
filtered |>
  group_by(scenario_label, method, clusterwise_label, n_sweet, n_ms, nu_0) |>
  summarise(
    `N runs`          = n(),
    `Mean ARI`        = mean(ARI, na.rm = TRUE) |> round(3),
    `SD ARI`          = sd(ARI, na.rm = TRUE) |> round(3),
    `Mean D`          = mean(final_D, na.rm = TRUE) |> round(4),
    `Mean sweets`     = mean(n_accepted_sweets, na.rm = TRUE) |> round(1),
    `Mean merges`     = mean(n_accepted_merges, na.rm = TRUE) |> round(1),
    `Mean splits`     = mean(n_accepted_splits, na.rm = TRUE) |> round(1),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) |>
  DT::datatable(
    options = list(
      pageLength = 12,
      dom = "Bfrtip",
      buttons = c("csv", "excel")
    ),
    extensions = "Buttons",
    filter = "top",
    caption = "Summary statistics – filtered results"
  )
Code 
filtered |>
  ggplot(aes(x = factor(n_sweet), y = ARI, colour = clusterwise_label)) +
  geom_boxplot(alpha = 0.25, outlier.shape = NA) +
  geom_point(position = position_jitterdodge(jitter.width = 0.22, dodge.width = 0.75),
             size = 2.6, alpha = 0.9) +
  facet_wrap(~ scenario_label, ncol = 1, labeller = label_wrap_gen(multi_line = TRUE)) +
  scale_colour_viridis_d(option = "C", name = "Clusterwise Wasserstein") +
  labs(
    title = "Adjusted Rand Index by number of sweetening iterations and clusterwise aggregation",
    subtitle = "Wasserstein discrepancy only",
    x = "Number of sweetening passes (n_sweet)", y = "Adjusted Rand Index"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 13) +
  theme(legend.position = "bottom", panel.grid.minor = element_blank())
  1. ARI by merge-split cycles and clusterwise setting
Code 
filtered |>
  ggplot(aes(x = factor(n_ms), y = ARI, colour = clusterwise_label)) +
  geom_boxplot(alpha = 0.25, outlier.shape = NA) +
  geom_point(position = position_jitterdodge(jitter.width = 0.22, dodge.width = 0.75),
             size = 2.6, alpha = 0.9) +
  facet_wrap(~ scenario_label, ncol = 1) +
  scale_colour_viridis_d(option = "plasma", name = "Clusterwise Wasserstein") +
  labs(
    title = "Adjusted Rand Index by number of merge-split cycles",
    subtitle = "Effect of refinement phase intensity",
    x = "Number of merge-split iterations (n_ms)", y = "Adjusted Rand Index"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 13) +
  theme(legend.position = "bottom", panel.grid.minor = element_blank())
  1. ARI by inverse-Wishart degrees of freedom (ν₀) and clusterwise computation
Code 
filtered |>
  ggplot(aes(x = factor(nu_0), y = ARI, colour = clusterwise_label)) +
  geom_boxplot(alpha = 0.25, outlier.shape = NA) +
  geom_point(position = position_jitterdodge(jitter.width = 0.22, dodge.width = 0.75),
             size = 2.6, alpha = 0.9) +
  facet_wrap(~ scenario_label, ncol = 1) +
  scale_colour_viridis_d(option = "viridis", name = "Clusterwise Wasserstein") +
  labs(
    title = expression("Adjusted Rand Index by inverse-Wishart prior degrees of freedom" ~ nu[0]),
    subtitle = "Effect of prior strength on MLE estimation",
    x = expression(nu[0]), y = "Adjusted Rand Index"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 13) +
  theme(legend.position = "bottom", panel.grid.minor = element_blank())
Source Code
---
title: "2D Gaussian Mixture Clustering Simulation Dashboard"
subtitle: "Evaluation of Wasserstein-based discrepancy measures and refinement strategies"
author: "Alexander"
date: "March 2026"
format:
  html:
    theme: cosmo
    toc: true
    toc-depth: 3
    toc-location: left
    code-fold: true
    code-tools: true
    page-layout: full
    fig-align: center
    fig-width: 15
    fig-height: 9
    embed-resources: true
params:
  results_dir: "results/simstudy/2D"
  scenario_filter: !expr c("scen1", "scen2")
  method_filter: !expr c("Wasserstein")
  clusterwise_filter: !expr c(TRUE, FALSE)
  nsweet_min: 1
  nsweet_max: 5
  nms_min: 0
  nms_max: 5
  nu0_min: 4
  nu0_max: 7
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
library(tidyverse)
library(ggplot2)
library(viridis)
library(DT)
library(patchwork)
library(salso)
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE, warning = FALSE, message = FALSE, fig.align = "center")
```

# Scenarios

```{r}
scen1 <- local({
  set.seed(1)
  N <- 100; K <- 3
  mu_true <- matrix(c(-2, 0, 0, 0, 2, 0), nrow = 3, byrow = TRUE)
  Sigma_true <- lapply(1:3, function(i) diag(c(0.2, 0.2)))
  w_true <- c(0.3, 0.4, 0.3)
  cl_true <- sample(1:K, N, replace = TRUE, prob = w_true)
  y <- matrix(NA, N, 2)
  for (k in 1:K) {
    idx <- cl_true == k
    y[idx, ] <- MASS::mvrnorm(sum(idx), mu_true[k, ], Sigma_true[[k]])
  }
  tibble(y1 = y[,1], y2 = y[,2], cluster = factor(cl_true))
})

scen1 |>
  ggplot(aes(x = y1, y = y2, colour = cluster)) +
  geom_point(size = 2.2, alpha = 0.85) +
  scale_colour_viridis_d(option = "plasma", end = 0.9) +
  labs(
    title = "Scenario 1",
    subtitle = "K = 3, N = 100, moderate overlap, equal variances",
    x = "Dimension 1", y = "Dimension 2"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 13) +
  theme(legend.position = "bottom", panel.grid.minor = element_blank())

```



```{r}
scen2 <- local({
  set.seed(2)
  N <- 150; K <- 4
  mu_true <- matrix(c(-4, 0, -1, 0, 1, 0, 4, 0), nrow = 4, byrow = TRUE)
  Sigma_true <- lapply(1:4, function(i) diag(c(0.5, 0.5)))
  w_true <- rep(0.25, 4)
  cl_true <- sample(1:K, N, replace = TRUE, prob = w_true)
  y <- matrix(NA, N, 2)
  for (k in 1:K) {
    idx <- cl_true == k
    y[idx, ] <- MASS::mvrnorm(sum(idx), mu_true[k, ], Sigma_true[[k]])
  }
  tibble(y1 = y[,1], y2 = y[,2], cluster = factor(cl_true))
})

scen2 |>
  ggplot(aes(x = y1, y = y2, colour = cluster)) +
  geom_point(size = 2.2, alpha = 0.85) +
  scale_colour_viridis_d(option = "viridis", end = 0.9) +
  labs(
    title = "Scenario 2",
    subtitle = "K = 4, N = 150, well separated, equal variances",
    x = "Dimension 1", y = "Dimension 2"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 13) +
  theme(legend.position = "bottom", panel.grid.minor = element_blank())
```
```{r}
results_dir <- params$results_dir
files <- list.files(results_dir, pattern = "\\.rds$", full.names = TRUE)

all_results <- map_dfr(files, readRDS) |>
  mutate(
    scenario_label = case_when(
      scenario == "scen1" ~ "Scenario 1 (moderate overlap)",
      scenario == "scen2" ~ "Scenario 2 (well separated)",
      TRUE ~ scenario
    ),
    clusterwise_label = if_else(clusterwise, "Yes (per-component)", "No (global mixture)")
  )

filtered <- all_results |>
  filter(
    scenario %in% params$scenario_filter,
    method %in% params$method_filter,
    clusterwise %in% params$clusterwise_filter,
    n_sweet >= params$nsweet_min,
    n_sweet <= params$nsweet_max,
    n_ms >= params$nms_min,
    n_ms <= params$nms_max,
    nu_0 >= params$nu0_min,
    nu_0 <= params$nu0_max
  )


```


```{r}
filtered |>
  group_by(scenario_label, method, clusterwise_label, n_sweet, n_ms, nu_0) |>
  summarise(
    `N runs`          = n(),
    `Mean ARI`        = mean(ARI, na.rm = TRUE) |> round(3),
    `SD ARI`          = sd(ARI, na.rm = TRUE) |> round(3),
    `Mean D`          = mean(final_D, na.rm = TRUE) |> round(4),
    `Mean sweets`     = mean(n_accepted_sweets, na.rm = TRUE) |> round(1),
    `Mean merges`     = mean(n_accepted_merges, na.rm = TRUE) |> round(1),
    `Mean splits`     = mean(n_accepted_splits, na.rm = TRUE) |> round(1),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) |>
  DT::datatable(
    options = list(
      pageLength = 12,
      dom = "Bfrtip",
      buttons = c("csv", "excel")
    ),
    extensions = "Buttons",
    filter = "top",
    caption = "Summary statistics – filtered results"
  )

```




```{r}
filtered |>
  ggplot(aes(x = factor(n_sweet), y = ARI, colour = clusterwise_label)) +
  geom_boxplot(alpha = 0.25, outlier.shape = NA) +
  geom_point(position = position_jitterdodge(jitter.width = 0.22, dodge.width = 0.75),
             size = 2.6, alpha = 0.9) +
  facet_wrap(~ scenario_label, ncol = 1, labeller = label_wrap_gen(multi_line = TRUE)) +
  scale_colour_viridis_d(option = "C", name = "Clusterwise Wasserstein") +
  labs(
    title = "Adjusted Rand Index by number of sweetening iterations and clusterwise aggregation",
    subtitle = "Wasserstein discrepancy only",
    x = "Number of sweetening passes (n_sweet)", y = "Adjusted Rand Index"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 13) +
  theme(legend.position = "bottom", panel.grid.minor = element_blank())

```

2. ARI by merge-split cycles and clusterwise setting

```{r}
filtered |>
  ggplot(aes(x = factor(n_ms), y = ARI, colour = clusterwise_label)) +
  geom_boxplot(alpha = 0.25, outlier.shape = NA) +
  geom_point(position = position_jitterdodge(jitter.width = 0.22, dodge.width = 0.75),
             size = 2.6, alpha = 0.9) +
  facet_wrap(~ scenario_label, ncol = 1) +
  scale_colour_viridis_d(option = "plasma", name = "Clusterwise Wasserstein") +
  labs(
    title = "Adjusted Rand Index by number of merge-split cycles",
    subtitle = "Effect of refinement phase intensity",
    x = "Number of merge-split iterations (n_ms)", y = "Adjusted Rand Index"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 13) +
  theme(legend.position = "bottom", panel.grid.minor = element_blank())

```

3. ARI by inverse-Wishart degrees of freedom (ν₀) and clusterwise computation

```{r}
filtered |>
  ggplot(aes(x = factor(nu_0), y = ARI, colour = clusterwise_label)) +
  geom_boxplot(alpha = 0.25, outlier.shape = NA) +
  geom_point(position = position_jitterdodge(jitter.width = 0.22, dodge.width = 0.75),
             size = 2.6, alpha = 0.9) +
  facet_wrap(~ scenario_label, ncol = 1) +
  scale_colour_viridis_d(option = "viridis", name = "Clusterwise Wasserstein") +
  labs(
    title = expression("Adjusted Rand Index by inverse-Wishart prior degrees of freedom" ~ nu[0]),
    subtitle = "Effect of prior strength on MLE estimation",
    x = expression(nu[0]), y = "Adjusted Rand Index"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 13) +
  theme(legend.position = "bottom", panel.grid.minor = element_blank())

```
